summary: Tested Belgian legal analysis features: Settings page country/region/language selectors, Profile API, Country Config API, Letter Types API (BE vs US), Upload page Belgian mode indicator. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/profile accepts country=BE, region=Wallonie, language=fr-BE
Backend: PUT /api/profile accepts region=Flandre with nl-BE language
Backend: PUT /api/profile accepts region=Bruxelles-Capitale
Backend: PUT /api/profile accepts region=Communaute germanophone with de-BE language
Backend: PUT /api/profile accepts country=US
Backend: GET /api/user/country-config returns Belgian config (4 regions, 3 languages) when user has country=BE
Backend: GET /api/user/country-config returns US config when user has country=US
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/employment?country=BE returns 8 Belgian letter types (CCT109, preavis, C4, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/housing?country=BE returns Belgian housing letter types (garantie, enregistrement, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/employment?country=US returns US letter types (no Belgian prefixes)
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/debt?country=BE returns Belgian debt letter types
Backend: GET /api/letters/types/nda?country=BE returns Belgian NDA letter types
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns country, region, language fields correctly
Frontend: Settings page Country selector shows 'United States' and 'Belgium / Belgique'
Frontend: When Belgium selected, Region dropdown appears with Wallonie/Bruxelles-Capitale/Vlaanderen-Flandre/Communaute germanophone
Frontend: When Belgium selected, Language dropdown appears with Francais/Nederlands/Deutsch
Frontend: Yellow info banner with 'Archer Belgique' appears when Belgium is selected
Frontend: Save changes persists country/region/language to profile (success message shown)
Frontend: Upload page shows Belgian mode indicator (🇧🇪 Archer Belgique · Wallonie · Droit belge applicable) when user has country=BE
Frontend: Mode toggle (Analyze risk vs Contract Guard) still works in Belgian mode
Frontend: Risk Monitor tab still works in Settings
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user, updated country/region/language via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Belgian legal analysis features fully implemented and tested. Settings page has Country selector (US/Belgium), and when Belgium is selected, Region (4 options: Wallonie, Bruxelles-Capitale, Flandre, Communaute germanophone) and Language (3 options: Francais, Nederlands, Deutsch) dropdowns appear with a yellow info banner. Profile API accepts country/region/language fields. Country Config API returns Belgian-specific config. Letter Types API returns Belgian letter types (BE_ prefixed) when ?country=BE is passed. Upload page shows Belgian mode indicator when user has country=BE in profile. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_belgian_features.py can be reused for regression testing.

settings_page_country_selector.language_dropdown: WORKING - Appears when Belgium selected with 3 languages
settings_page_country_selector.info_banner: WORKING - Yellow banner with 'Archer Belgique' text appears

profile_api.language_field: WORKING - PUT /api/profile accepts fr-BE, nl-BE, de-BE

country_config_api.belgian_config: WORKING - Returns 4 regions and 3 languages when user is BE
country_config_api.us_config: WORKING - Returns US config when user is US

letter_types_api.us_employment: WORKING - US letter types (no BE_ prefixes)
